role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within script/language analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, climate, and vegetation types consistent with the domain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific tree species (Betula pendula, Picea abies) visible in the image.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed the 'No Stopping' sign and road infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (architecture, street furniture, camera artifacts) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the region (Balkans/Yugoslav states) but failed to distinguish between Serbia and Bosnia and Herzegovina due to the high visual similarity of the socialist-era architecture. The agents provided solid evidence, but the specific visual cues (balcony railings, lamp design) were not unique enough to rule out the ground truth (Serbia).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Correctly described the temperate climate and apartment block density.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified the birch and spruce trees.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described the sign and road surface.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly described the architectural style and street furniture.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The visual evidence (socialist-era apartment blocks, specific balcony railings, street lamps) is highly characteristic of the former Yugoslavia and is shared by both Serbia and Bosnia and Herzegovina. The agents and tournament judge could not distinguish between the two based on the available visual cues.
